title: dendrochilum kingii
intro: Dendrochilum kingii is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots and stems, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Dendrochilum kingii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Dendrochilum kingii is often dried and made into a decoction or infused in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
